_comment: vix e2e seccomp profile. Default-allow so the landlock_* syscalls vix uses for its in-process sandbox are permitted even on older Docker daemons whose default profile predates landlock. Real isolation for the e2e run comes from the container boundary itself: an ephemeral filesystem, a throwaway HOME/workdir, and `--network none`. To harden further, replace this with Docker's default seccomp profile augmented with landlock_create_ruleset / landlock_add_rule / landlock_restrict_self in its allow list.
